turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I just bought a new car and need to understand my insurance policy better. Can you help me figure out what it covers?

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Of course! Let's start by looking at the basic coverage types: liability, collision, and comprehensive. Which one are you most concerned about?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I'm a bit worried about collision coverage. What does that actually mean?

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Collision coverage pays for damage to your car when it collides with another object, including hitting something stationary like a tree or pole. It also covers damage from an accident where you're at fault.
